inputs.label: Speed in Mbps
inputs.businessContext: Measured or nominal data rate in megabits per second.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured or nominal data rate in megabits per second.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Megabit/saniye cinsinden ölçülen veya nominal veri hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene oder nominale Datenrate in Megabit pro Sekunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit de données mesuré ou nominal en mégabits par seconde.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de datos medida o nominal en megabits por segundo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل البيانات المُقاس أو الاسمي بالميغابت في الثانية.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion: 1 Gbps = 1000 Mbps. Adjust for non-standard units.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion: 1 Gbps = 1000 Mbps. Adjust for non-standard units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart dönüşüm: 1 Gbps = 1000 Mbps. Standart olmayan birimler için ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardumrechnung: 1 Gbit/s = 1000 Mbit/s. Bei nicht standardmäßigen Einheiten anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Conversion standard : 1 Gbps = 1000 Mbps. Ajuster pour les unités non standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Conversión estándar: 1 Gbps = 1000 Mbps. Ajustar para unidades no estándar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التحويل القياسي: 1 جيجابت/ثانية = 1000 ميغابت/ثانية. اضبط للوحدات غير القياسية.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Output precision in decimal places for reporting consistency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Output precision in decimal places for reporting consistency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Raporlama tutarlılığı için ondalık basamak cinsinden çıktı hassasiyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ausgabegenauigkeit in Dezimalstellen für konsistente Berichterstattung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Précision de sortie en décimales pour la cohérence des rapports.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precisión de salida en decimales para consistencia en informes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: دقة الإخراج بعدد المنازل العشرية لتناسق التقارير.

inputs.label: Calibration Offset (Mbps)
inputs.businessContext: Calibration correction value added to the input. Typically 0 for uncalibrated readings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Calibration correction value added to the input. Typically 0 for uncalibrated readings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Girişe eklenen kalibrasyon düzeltme değeri. Kalibre edilmemiş okumalar için genellikle 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kalibrierungskorrekturwert, der zum Eingang addiert wird. Typischerweise 0 für unkalibrierte Messwerte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de correction d'étalonnage ajoutée à l'entrée. Généralement 0 pour les lectures non étalonnées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de corrección de calibración añadido a la entrada. Normalmente 0 para lecturas no calibradas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة تصحيح المعايرة المضافة إلى الإدخال. عادةً 0 للقراءات غير المعايرة.

inputs.label: Measurement ID
inputs.businessContext: For traceability to measurement records, set to 0 if not applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: For traceability to measurement records, set to 0 if not applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm kayıtlarına izlenebilirlik için, uygun değilse 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Für Rückverfolgbarkeit zu Messaufzeichnungen, auf 0 setzen, falls nicht zutreffend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pour la traçabilité des enregistrements de mesure, mettre à 0 si non applicable.
businessContext_i18n.es: Para trazabilidad a registros de medición, establecer en 0 si no aplica.
businessContext_i18n.ar: للتتبع إلى سجلات القياس، اضبط على 0 إذا لم ينطبق.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
